remember: Students will be able to recall the different types of computer networks, their characteristics, and applications.
Students will be able to list the various devices used in a computer network.
Students will be able to describe the functions of network protocols and standards.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of network topologies and their advantages and disadvantages.
Students will be able to describe the process of network configuration and setup.
Students will be able to understand the concept of network security and its importance.
apply: Students will be able to design and set up a simple computer network.
Students will be able to configure network devices and protocols.
Students will be able to troubleshoot common network problems.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the performance of a computer network and identify areas for improvement.
Students will be able to evaluate the security risks associated with a computer network and recommend solutions.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different types of computer networks and their applications.

ncert_objectives: Explain the need for networks and types of networks.
Describe the architecture of a network.
Explain the types of network topologies.
Describe the network protocols and standards.
Describe the network devices and their functions.
board_exam_objectives: Define network and explain the types of networks.
Describe the network architecture and topologies.
Explain the network protocols and security measures.
List the network devices and their functions.
Explain the network configuration and setup.
